events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing lockable disconnect is a NEC 430.102/430.104 violation — motor circuit is in service without a way to lock out power for maintenance, creating a shock/arc-flash hazard. Marked `fail`, `high` risk, with corrective actions (lock out at the upstream OCPD, install a compliant lockable disconnect within sight of the motor, re-inspect).
